<style>
#scrollToTop {
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 30px;
  right: 30px;
  width: 60px;
  height: 60px;
  background-color: #000000;
  color: #ffffff;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  opacity: 0;
  visibility: hidden;
  cursor: pointer;
  border: none;
  overflow: hidden;
  z-index: 999;
  transition: opacity 0.3s ease, visibility 0.3s ease;
   border-radius: 50%;
    
}

/* Fill styles and animations */
#scrollToTop::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: var(--scroll-progress, 0%);
  background: #333333;
  z-index: 1;
  
}

/* Remove fill if 'none' */


/* Icon wrapper and svg */
#scrollToTop .icon-wrapper {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}

#scrollToTop svg {
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  fill: #ffffff;
}

/* Hover animations using intensity variable */




/* Fill animations */
@keyframes wave {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-3px); }
}
@keyframes pulse-fill {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 0.8; }
  50% { opacity: 0.4; }
}

/* Mobile styles */
@media screen and (max-width: 767px) {
  
    #scrollToTop {
      width: 50px !important;
      height: 50px !important;
      bottom: 20px !important;
      right: 20px !important;
    }
  
}
</style>

<button id="scrollToTop" aria-label="Scroll to top" type="button">
  <div class="icon-wrapper" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
      <path d="M12 4l-8 8h5v8h6v-8h5z"></path>
    </svg>
  </div>
</button>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const scrollToTopBtn = document.getElementById('scrollToTop');
  const scrollThreshold = 300;
  const supportsVibration = 'vibrate' in navigator;

  window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
    const scrollY = window.scrollY || window.pageYOffset;
    const scrollHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;
    const scrollPercent = scrollHeight > 0 ? (scrollY / scrollHeight) * 100 : 0;

    if (scrollY > scrollThreshold) {
      scrollToTopBtn.style.opacity = '1';
      scrollToTopBtn.style.visibility = 'visible';
    } else {
      scrollToTopBtn.style.opacity = '0';
      scrollToTopBtn.style.visibility = 'hidden';
    }

    scrollToTopBtn.style.setProperty('--scroll-progress', scrollPercent + '%');
  });

  scrollToTopBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    if (supportsVibration && /Android|iPhone|iPad|iPod/i.test(navigator.userAgent)) {
      navigator.vibrate(50);
    }
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
  });
});
</script></div><div id="shopify-section-template--19521607106808__catagory_cards_4T9pVc" class="shopify-section"><style data-shopify="">/* Font family mapping */

<style>
.running-carousel-section {
  width: 100%;
  padding-top: 20px;
  padding-bottom: 20px;
  background-color: #f3f3f3;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.section-heading {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 30px;
  font-size: 28px;
}

  overflow: hidden;
  width: 100%;
  position: relative;
}

.running-carousel-track {
  display: flex;
  width: max-content;
}

.running-carousel-product {
  width: 180px;
  margin-right: 16px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  transition: transform 0.3s ease;
  height: 100%;
  user-select: none;
  -webkit-user-drag: none;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.running-carousel-product:hover {
  transform: translateY(-5px);
}

.product-image {
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
  width: 100%;
  background: #f8f8f8;
  border-radius: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.product-image img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
}

.product-info {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  min-height: 40px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.product-info h3 {
  font-size: 14px;
  margin: 0;
  text-align: center;
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: normal;
  max-height: 3.2em;
}

.add-to-cart-btn {
  margin-top: auto;
  background-color: #cb2730;
  color: #fff;
  border: none;
  padding: 10px;
  font-size: 14px;
  width: 100%;
  border-radius: 4px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.3s ease;
}

.add-to-cart-btn:hover {
  background-color: #333333;
}

/* Mobile swipe styles */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .running-carousel-container {
    overflow-x: auto;
    scrollbar-width: none; /* Firefox */
    -ms-overflow-style: none; /* IE */
    touch-action: pan-x;
  }
  
  .running-carousel-container::-webkit-scrollbar {
    display: none; /* Chrome/Safari */
  }
  
  .running-carousel-track {
    transition: transform 0.5s ease-out;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .product-info h3 {
    font-size: 12px;
  }
}
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.running-carousel-section');

  sections.forEach(section => {
    const container = section.querySelector('.running-carousel-container');
    const track = section.querySelector('.running-carousel-track');
    const products = track.querySelectorAll('.running-carousel-product');
    const speed = 20;
    const productWidth = 180;
    const gap = 16;
    const pauseOnHover = true;
    const scrollDirection = "right";
    const buttonText = "Add to Cart";
    const resumeDelay = 3000;

    // State variables
    let isMobile = window.innerWidth <= 768;
    let isAutoScrolling = true;
    let isDragging = false;
    let touchStartX = 0;
    let currentPosition = 0;
    let animationId = null;
    let resumeTimeout = null;
    let lastScrollTime = 0;
    const productSize = productWidth + gap;
    const totalWidth = productSize * products.length / 2;

    // New slower speed calculation
    function getAnimationDuration() {
      // Original: (21 - speed) - now inverted and multiplied for slower speeds
      // Speed 1 (slowest): (1 * 3) + 17 = 20
      // Speed 20 (fastest): (20 * 0.1) + 0.5 = 2.5
      return (speed * 0.1) + 0.5;
    }

    function initCarousel() {
      if (isMobile) {
        setupMobileCarousel();
      } else {
        setupDesktopCarousel();
      }
    }

    function setupDesktopCarousel() {
      cancelAnimationFrame(animationId);
      clearTimeout(resumeTimeout);
      
      // Slower animation duration calculation
      const duration = totalWidth / (20 * getAnimationDuration());
      track.style.animation = `${scrollDirection === 'left' ? 'scroll-left' : 'scroll-right'} ${duration}s linear infinite`;
      track.style.transform = 'none';
      isAutoScrolling = true;
    }

    function setupMobileCarousel() {
      track.style.animation = 'none';
      currentPosition = 0;
      updateTrackPosition();
      startAutoScroll();
    }

    function startAutoScroll() {
      if (!isMobile || isDragging) return;
      
      isAutoScrolling = true;
      lastScrollTime = Date.now();
      
      const animate = () => {
        if (!isAutoScrolling || isDragging) return;
        
        const now = Date.now();
        const delta = now - lastScrollTime;
        lastScrollTime = now;
        
        // Slower scroll amount calculation
        const scrollAmount = (productSize * delta) / (1000 * getAnimationDuration());
        
        if (scrollDirection === 'left') {
          currentPosition -= scrollAmount;
          if (currentPosition <= -totalWidth) currentPosition += totalWidth;
        } else {
          currentPosition += scrollAmount;
          if (currentPosition >= 0) currentPosition -= totalWidth;
        }
        
        updateTrackPosition();
        animationId = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
      };
      
      animate();
    }

    function stopAutoScroll() {
      isAutoScrolling = false;
      cancelAnimationFrame(animationId);
    }

    function resumeAutoScroll() {
      clearTimeout(resumeTimeout);
      resumeTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
        if (!isDragging) {
          startAutoScroll();
        }
      }, resumeDelay);
    }

    function updateTrackPosition() {
      track.style.transform = `translateX(${currentPosition}px)`;
    }

    // Touch event handlers
    function handleTouchStart(e) {
      if (!isMobile) return;
      
      stopAutoScroll();
      isDragging = true;
      touchStartX = e.touches[0].clientX;
      track.style.transition = 'none';
    }

    function handleTouchMove(e) {
      if (!isMobile || !isDragging) return;
      
      e.preventDefault();
      const touchX = e.touches[0].clientX;
      const diff = touchX - touchStartX;
      currentPosition += diff;
      touchStartX = touchX;
      updateTrackPosition();
    }

    function handleTouchEnd() {
      if (!isMobile || !isDragging) return;
      
      isDragging = false;
      track.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease-out';
      
      // Snap to nearest product
      const snappedPosition = Math.round(currentPosition / productSize) * productSize;
      currentPosition = snappedPosition;
      updateTrackPosition();
      
      // Resume auto-scroll after delay
      resumeAutoScroll();
    }

    // Initialize carousel
    initCarousel();

    // Handle resize
    window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
      const newIsMobile = window.innerWidth <= 768;
      if (newIsMobile !== isMobile) {
        isMobile = newIsMobile;
        initCarousel();
      }
    });

    // Pause on hover (desktop only)
    if (pauseOnHover) {
      container.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
        if (!isMobile) {
          track.style.animationPlayState = 'paused';
        }
      });
      container.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
        if (!isMobile) {
          track.style.animationPlayState = 'running';
        }
      });
    }

    // Touch events
    container.addEventListener('touchstart', handleTouchStart, { passive: false });
    container.addEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove, { passive: false });
    container.addEventListener('touchend', handleTouchEnd);

    // Add scroll-left and scroll-right keyframes with slower timing
    const style = document.createElement('style');
    style.textContent = `
      @keyframes scroll-left {
        0% { transform: translateX(0); }
        100% { transform: translateX(calc(-50% - ${gap/2}px)); }
      }
      @keyframes scroll-right {
        0% { transform: translateX(calc(-50% - ${gap/2}px)); }
        100% { transform: translateX(0); }
      }
    `;
    document.head.appendChild(style);

    // Add to cart button functionality
    container.querySelectorAll('.add-to-cart-btn').forEach(button => {
      button.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const variantId = this.dataset.variantId;
        const btn = this;

        if (variantId) {
          btn.disabled = true;
          btn.textContent = 'Adding...';

          fetch('/cart/add.js', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ items: [{ id: variantId, quantity: 1 }] })
          })
          .then(res => res.json())
          .then(() => {
            btn.textContent = 'Added!';
            setTimeout(() => {
              btn.textContent = buttonText;
              btn.disabled = false;
            }, 2000);
          })
          .catch(() => {
            btn.textContent = 'Error';
            setTimeout(() => {
              btn.textContent = buttonText;
              btn.disabled = false;
            }, 2000);
          });
        }
      });
    });
  });
});

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const animateCounters = () => {
    const counters = document.querySelectorAll('.stat-number');
    const startTime = performance.now();
    
    counters.forEach(counter => {
      const target = parseFloat(counter.dataset.target.replace(/,/g, ''));
      const duration = parseFloat(counter.dataset.duration) * 1000;
      const start = parseFloat(counter.textContent.replace(/,/g, ''));
      
      const animate = (currentTime) => {
        const elapsed = currentTime - startTime;
        const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
        const current = start + (target - start) * progress;
        
        if (target % 1 !== 0) {
          counter.textContent = current.toFixed(1);
        } else {
          counter.textContent = Math.floor(current).toLocaleString();
        }
        
        if (progress < 1) {
          requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        } else {
          counter.textContent = target % 1 !== 0 
            ? target.toFixed(1) 
            : target.toLocaleString();
        }
      };
      
      requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    });
  };
  
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        animateCounters();
        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.5 });
  
  observer.observe(document.querySelector('.animated-stats'));
});
</script></div><section id="shopify-section-template--19521607106808__rich_text_dQYJjy" class="shopify-section section"><link href="//widetraders.pk/cdn/shop/t/8/assets/section-rich-text.css?v=155250126305810049721746267993" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" media="all">

<style>
#scrollToTop {
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 100px;
  right: 36px;
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  background-color: #ffa4aa;
  color: #ffffff;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  opacity: 0;
  visibility: hidden;
  cursor: pointer;
  border: none;
  overflow: hidden;
  z-index: 999;
  transition: opacity 0.3s ease, visibility 0.3s ease;
   border-radius: 50%;
    
}

/* Fill styles and animations */
#scrollToTop::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: var(--scroll-progress, 0%);
  background: #cb2730;
  z-index: 1;
  
  animation: wave 2s infinite ease-in-out;
  
}

/* Remove fill if 'none' */


/* Icon wrapper and svg */
#scrollToTop .icon-wrapper {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}

#scrollToTop svg {
  width: 20px;
  height: 20px;
  fill: #ffffff;
}

/* Hover animations using intensity variable */



  #scrollToTop:hover { animation: bounce 1s; }
  @keyframes bounce {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
    50% { transform: translateY(calc(-8px * 0)); }
  }


/* Fill animations */
@keyframes wave {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-3px); }
}
@keyframes pulse-fill {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 0.8; }
  50% { opacity: 0.4; }
}

/* Mobile styles */
@media screen and (max-width: 767px) {
  
    #scrollToTop {
      width: 36px !important;
      height: 36px !important;
      bottom: 76px !important;
      right: 22px !important;
    }
  
}
</style>

<button id="scrollToTop" aria-label="Scroll to top" type="button">
  <div class="icon-wrapper" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
      <path d="M12 4l-8 8h5v8h6v-8h5z"></path>
    </svg>
  </div>
</button>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const scrollToTopBtn = document.getElementById('scrollToTop');
  const scrollThreshold = 300;
  const supportsVibration = 'vibrate' in navigator;

  window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
    const scrollY = window.scrollY || window.pageYOffset;
    const scrollHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;
    const scrollPercent = scrollHeight > 0 ? (scrollY / scrollHeight) * 100 : 0;

    if (scrollY > scrollThreshold) {
      scrollToTopBtn.style.opacity = '1';
      scrollToTopBtn.style.visibility = 'visible';
    } else {
      scrollToTopBtn.style.opacity = '0';
      scrollToTopBtn.style.visibility = 'hidden';
    }

    scrollToTopBtn.style.setProperty('--scroll-progress', scrollPercent + '%');
  });

  scrollToTopBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    if (supportsVibration && /Android|iPhone|iPad|iPod/i.test(navigator.userAgent)) {
      navigator.vibrate(50);
    }
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
  });
});
</script></div><section id="shopify-section-template--19521607106808__rich_text_xGgGFr" class="shopify-section section"><link href="//widetraders.pk/cdn/shop/t/8/assets/section-rich-text.css?v=155250126305810049721746267993" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" media="all">
